sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: ICE는 2025년 연간 순매출 99억 달러(+7%)로 20년 연속 매출 신기록을 달성했으며, GAAP 희석 EPS는 5.77달러(+21%), 조정 희석 EPS는 6.95달러(+14%)를 기록했다.
연간 조정 영업이익은 60억 달러(+10%), 조정 잉여현금흐름은 42억 달러(+16%)로 수익성과 현금창출력이 동시에 강화됐다.
2025년 중 주주에게 24억 달러를 환원했으며, 이 중 자사주 매입이 13억 달러를 차지했다.

businessChanges.text: 거래소 복합 부문에서 거래량 신기록이 달성됐고, 채권 프랜차이즈의 규모 확장과 모기지 기술 사업의 성장이 '전천후' 사업 모델의 균형 잡힌 성과를 뒷받침했다.
4분기 통합 순매출은 25억 달러(+8% y/y)로, 주요 사업 부문 모두에서 견조한 현금흐름이 유지됐다.
연간 영업 현금흐름은 47억 달러(+1%)로 신기록을 기록했으며, 회사는 목표 레버리지 범위 내에서 재무 규율을 유지했다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP 순이익은 8억 5,100만 달러이며, 조정 순이익은 9억 7,500만 달러, 조정 EPS는 1.71달러였다.
연간 GAAP 기준 ICE 귀속 순이익은 33억 달러, 조정 순이익은 40억 달러로, 수익성 측면에서 뚜렷한 개선을 보였다.
2025년 조정 영업이익률 60%, GAAP 영업이익률 50%를 달성하며 비용 효율성이 입증됐다.
기록적인 조정 잉여현금흐름 42억 달러는 전년 대비 16% 성장하며 자본 배분 여력을 확대했다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 사업 가이던스 및 각 세그먼트(거래소·채권·모기지 기술) 성장 목표가 컨퍼런스콜에서 제시될 전망이며, 'durable growth' 실행 계획의 구체성이 주목 포인트다.
레버리지 목표 범위 내 유지를 언급한 만큼, 2026년 추가 자사주 매입 또는 M&A 여력에 대한 자본 배분 방향이 확인 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 tm264989d1_ex99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Exhibit 99.1 Intercontinental Exchange Reports Strong Full Year 2025 Results 20th consecutive year of record revenues · 2025 net revenues of $9.9 billion, +7% y/y Jeff Sprecher , ICE Chair & Chief Executive Officer, said, “As we close out 2025, we are pleased to report our 20th consecutive year of record revenues and continued earnings per share growth, driven by the strength of our diversified 'all-weather' business model and the trust of our global customers. Across our exchanges, fixed income, and mortgage technology platforms, we continued to modernize critical financial infrastructure leveraging best in class technology and automation, while operating with discipline in a dynamic macro environment. We saw record volumes across our exchange complex, our fixed income franchise continued to scale, and our mortgage technology business  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.9 billion = 99억 달러; $9.9 = 9.9달러.

the year with renewed strength. Entering 2026, we believe the tailwinds behind our businesses are strong and we remain focused on innovation, durable growth, and long-term value creation for our shareholders.” · 2025 GAAP diluted EPS of $5.77, +21% y/y · 2025 adj. diluted EPS of $6.95, +14% y/y · Record 2025 operating income of $4.9 billion, +14% y/y; record adj. operating income of $6.0 billion, +10% y/y · 2025 operating margin of 50%; adj. operating margin of 60% · Record annual operating cash flow of $4.7 billion, +1% y/y; record adj. free cash flow of $4.2 billion, +16% y/y · Through December 31, 2025, returned $2.4 billion to stockholders, including $1.3 billion in share repurchases ATLANTA & NEW YORK,  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.9 billion = 49억 달러; $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $4.7 billion = 47억 달러; $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $5.77 = 5.77달러; $6.95 = 6.95달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $4.9 = 4.9달러; $4.7 = 4.7달러; $4.2 = 4.2달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러.

2025. For the quarter ended December 31, 2025, consolidated net income attributable to ICE was $851 million on $2.5 billion of consolidated revenues less transaction-based expenses. Fourth quarter GAAP diluted earnings per share (EPS) were $1.49. Adjusted net income attributable to ICE was $975 million in the fourth quarter and adjusted diluted EPS were $1.71. For the full year of 2025, consolidated net income attributable to ICE was $3.3 billion on $9.9 billion of consolidated revenues less transaction-based expenses. Full year 2025 GAAP diluted EPS was $5.77, up 21% year-over-year. On an adjusted basis, net income attributable to ICE for the year was $4.0 billion and adjusted  Normalized numeric aliases: $851 million = 8억 5,100만 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $975 million = 9억 7,500만 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $9.9 billion = 99억 달러; $4.0 billion = 40억 달러; $851 = 851달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $975 = 975달러; $4.0 = 4.0달러; $1.71 = 1.71달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; $9.9 = 9.9달러; $5.77 = 5.77달러; $6.95 = 6.95달러.

income, adjusted operating margin, adjusted net income, adjusted diluted EPS and adjusted free cash flow. 1 Warren Gardiner, ICE Chief Financial Officer, added: "Our fourth quarter results capped another year of record revenues and operating income, supported by strong, durable cash flows from each of our major business lines and continued attention to operating efficiency. We maintained a balanced approach to leverage, ending the year well within our target leverage range, enabling us to reinvest in our network, while also returning $2.4 billion to shareholders. As we look ahead to 2026, we remain focused on disciplined investment, operational rigor, and enhancing the value we deliver to our customers and shareholders." Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Business Highlights Fourth quarter consolidated net revenues were $2.5 billion, up 8% year-over-year, including exchange net  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러.
